# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Use this section to tell people about which versions of your project are currently being supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities by emailing [SECURITY@Kartezy.com](mailto:SECURITY@Kartezy.com) or by using the [GitHub Security Advisory](https://github.com/Kartezy/Kartezy/security/advisories) feature.

We will acknowledge receipt of your report within 24 hours, and will follow up with more details about next steps, which can include:
- Request for additional information if needed
- Confirmation that we can reproduce the issue
- Information about the fix timeline and release process
